title: Claude Code
description: Run Claude Code AI agent on snapshots to extract, analyze, or transform archived content.

CLAUDECODE_ENABLED.description: Enable Claude Code AI agent integration. Controls whether the Claude CLI dependency is resolved for this plugin; child plugins still need the claudecode plugin enabled and a working Claude binary.

CLAUDECODE_BINARY.description: Path to Claude Code CLI binary

CLAUDECODE_TIMEOUT.description: Timeout for Claude Code operations in seconds

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Claude Code authentication

CLAUDECODE_MODEL.description: Claude model to use (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)

CLAUDECODE_MAX_TURNS.description: Maximum number of agentic turns per invocation
